pkgmetadata.longdescription: This library contains infrastructure for DAG-shaped plans of relational operators. It offers an API for construction and modification of algebra plans and a DSL for specifying rewrites on plans. Examples of usage can be found in the packages <http://hackage.haskell.org/package/DSH DSH> and <http://hackage.haskell.org/package/algebra-sql algebra-sql>
